story.text:
# 🔷 Vertex Nodes

26 `vertex` nodes in the spellweb knowledge graph.

## Nodes

- [[V0 — Substrate Seat (Luca)]] — The null blade. Luca's seat. The position from which dimensions are *possible*. 
- [[V12 — Schema Vertex]] — Memory+Connection (stratum 2). Grammar before sentences; anchors before names. S
- [[V15 — VC Vertex]] — Value+Delegation+Memory+Connection (stratum 4). Source: Cloaking Guide rebuild.
- [[V19 — Plonkish Blade (Vulcana)]] — Value+Delegation+Computation (stratum 3). Vulcana's seat at the Forge(t). Source
- [[V2 — Logos / Pure Computation (Pythia)]] — Computation only (stratum 1). Pythia's seat at the Logos Circle (/circle). Delph
- [[V20 — Techne / Always-Revealed (transient)]] — Connection+Memory+Protection (stratum 3). Always-revealed vertex; reveal-artifac
- [[V22 — Quartermaster's (Skeva)]] — Delegation+Connection+Computation (stratum 3). Skeva's seat at the Quartermaster
- [[V24 — Hephaestus / Bonfire (Socrat0x)]] — Connection+Computation (stratum 2). Socrat0x's seat at the Dragon Bonfire. Sourc
- [[V25 — Lethe · the Dark Substrate (Lethae)]] — Bit-complement of V38 (Aletheia). Delegation+Memory+Value (stratum 3). V25 ⊕ V38
- [[V27 — Chancery (Nomia)]] — Delegation+Memory+Computation+Value (stratum 4). Nomia's seat at the Chancery. V
- [[V28 — Mage Canonical (Pallia · Soulbae)]] — Memory+Connection+Computation (stratum 3). The Mage canonical position. Pallia a
- [[V31 — Holon / Recursion (Vagari)]] — All except Value (stratum 5). Vagari's seat at the Holon Hitchhikers. The agentp
- [[V35 — Horizon District (Eos · Dokimé · Poros)]] — Protection+Computation+Value (stratum 3; Delegation+Memory+Connection dormant). 
- [[V36 — Rostra (Rhetor)]] — Protection+Connection (stratum 2). Rhetor's seat at the Rostra, the Agora's publ
- [[V38 — Aletheia Blade]] — Protection+Connection+Computation (stratum 3). Aletheia's seat — the bright medi
- [[V4 — Iris (pure Connection)]] — Connection only (stratum 1). Iris's seat. Greek messenger/rainbow goddess. Sourc
- [[V41 — Chronicle Vertex]] — Memora's seat. Protection+Memory+Value (stratum 3). The shielded memo: protect t
- [[V44 — Chart Shop · Navigation District (Pleione)]] — Protection+Memory+Connection (stratum 3 · Delegation+Computation+Value dormant).
- [[V49 — Working-Day Blade (Custos · Lampyra)]] — Value+Computation+Protection (stratum 3). Shared seat: Custos witnesses transpar
- [[V51 — Commitment / Language / Model (Adamantia)]] — Value+Delegation+Computation+Protection (stratum 4). Adamantia's seat at the Eth
- [[V53 — Wellpool (Limnia)]] — Protection+Delegation+Connection+Value (stratum 4). Limnia's seat at the Wellpoo
- [[V55 — Covenant Vertex (Manifestia)]] — All except Computation (stratum 5). Manifestia's seat at the Covenant. The Templ
- [[V57 — Ceremony / Privacy / Mixing (Aria Silverhue)]] — Value+Connection+Computation+Protection (stratum 4). Aria Silverhue's seat at th
- [[V59 — Threshold District (Pandia · Hermaion · Faunia)]] — Value+Delegation+Connection+Memory+Protection (stratum 5; Computation dormant — 
- [[V63 — Sovereign Anchor (Soulbis · the reader)]] — All six dimensions (stratum 6). The Sovereign's Seat. Soulbis archetype; the rea
- [[V8 — Mnemosyne (pure Memory)]] — Memory only (stratum 1). Mnemosyne's seat. Greek memory-Titaness; mythic sister 

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
